data.title: A.I. rally and bubble concerns may persist next year as Big Tech invests heavily in artificial intelligence, leading to investor anxiety.
data.description: Investors are growing anxious due to Big Tech's significant investment in artificial intelligence, which amounts to billions of dollars. Despite this concern, the technology is constantly evolving and improving, leading to optimism among bullish investors.

data.title: Everlight Solar helps Midwest communities during holidays by volunteering and donating gifts to support families in need.
data.description: In Madison, Wisconsin on December 22, 2025, Everlight Solar concluded the holiday season by making significant community contributions in the Midwest region. Employees from various branches participated in volunteer activities and contributed towards providing gifts to assist local families and organizations. This initiative highlights the company's commitment to giving back during the festive period.

data.title: Marti Technologies expects to surpass 2025 guidance, with $70 million revenue and over 2x growth projected for 2026.
data.description: Marti Technologies, Inc. announced that they anticipate surpassing their initial expectations for 2025 and have set ambitious goals for 2026. In the upcoming year, the leading mobility super app in Turkey foresees reaching $70 million in revenue, which signifies more than a twofold increase in revenue compared to the previous year. They also aim to achieve positive adjusted EBITDA. This substantial growth in revenue and the positive EBITDA are projected to be fueled by several factors.

data.title: J-Long Group Limited (NASDAQ: JL) reports unaudited financial results for the first half of 2025 in Hong Kong.
data.description: Today, in Hong Kong, J-Long Group Limited (NASDAQ: JL), a company specializing in apparel trims solution services, disclosed its unaudited financial results for the six months concluding on September 30, 2025.

data.title: Bybit became top spot in 24-hour trading volume, hitting over $9.2 billion on Dec 22, 2025, with NIGHT trading surge.
data.description: On December 22, 2025, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange worldwide in terms of trading volume, achieved a significant milestone by securing the top spot for spot trading market share. This accomplishment marked the closure of the year with over $9.2 billion, surpassing competitors in the industry. The exchange, headquartered in Dubai, UAE, demonstrated its dominance and growth in the market by outperforming others in the industry.

data.title: LEPAS L8 showcased in Milan from Dec. 16-22 at Piazza Gae Aulenti, hosting a 7-day roadshow, embodying Italian elegance.
data.description: Between December 16 and 22, 2025, LEPAS, the NEV brand belonging to Chery Group, showcased its leading model, the LEPAS L8, at Piazza Gae Aulenti in Milan through a seven-day brand roadshow. The vibrant square exuded a festive ambiance with numerous twinkling lights.

Chinese scientists have genetically modified monkeys to show traits similar to schizophrenia and autism. This kind of research is not allowed in the US and Europe because it raises serious ethical and animal-welfare concerns.

data.title: Westin Acquisition Corp allows separate trading of 5,750,000 IPO units: ordinary shares and rights. Begins Dec 23. NASDAQ: WSTNU.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, Westin Acquisition Corp revealed that holders of its 5,750,000 units from the initial public offering now have the option to trade the ordinary shares and rights included in the units individually. The company, listed as NASDAQ: WSTNU and based in the Cayman Islands, made this announcement. Trading of the separate components is expected to begin on or around the same date.

data.title: Ford pickup truck is most stolen vehicle in Georgia, report by USInsuranceAgents.com. Drivers warned to be cautious.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, on December 23, 2025, USInsuranceAgents.com released its report detailing the most frequently stolen vehicles in Georgia. Motorists who own the identified vehicles should exercise heightened vigilance to deter theft. Ford pickup trucks are a recurring presence on the list of at-risk vehicles. This serves as a cautionary signal for drivers to take proactive measures to safeguard their automobiles.

data.title: Ohio's 529 plan receives national recognition for excellence. An increase of 15% in new accounts.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 7.2%, marking a significant rise from the previous month. The number of job seekers has also surged to 1.5 million, the highest on record in the past year. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in the number of job vacancies by 12%, indicating a challenging labor market. The government is considering implementing new measures to address this alarming trend and boost economic growth.

data.title: Roadzen to showcase DrivebuddyAI at CES 2026, with live demos highlighting its AI platform trained on billions of kilometers of driving data, validated under Indian AIS-184 and EU GSR 2144 standards.
data.description: Witness live demonstrations in Las Vegas showcasing DrivebuddyAI's cutting-edge AI platform that prioritizes vision and continuous learning. This platform, trained on an extensive dataset spanning billions of kilometers of actual driving experiences, stands out as the sole driver monitoring system approved under both Indian AIS-184 and EU GSR 2144 regulations. Explore the innovative capabilities of DrivebuddyAI firsthand at the event in Las Vegas.

data.title: Law firm Hagens Berman probing Klarna amid 102% spike in credit loss provision risk tied to Fair Financing growth.
data.description: Attorney Reed Kathrein is probing possible misrepresentation of provision trends and lending risk by management. San Francisco, December 23, 2025 - Shareholder rights law firm Hagens Berman is investigating potential securities law violations by Klarna Group. The firm is looking into whether management misrepresented these trends.

data.title: CT United FC appoints Shavar Thomas as first Head Coach, aiming for MLS NEXT Pro and MLS success. Bridgeport, Dec. 23, 2025.
data.description: CT United FC has appointed former MLS Top-10 draft pick, National Team Captain, and Championship Coach Shavar Thomas as their inaugural Head Coach. The announcement was made on December 23, 2025, at Bridgeport, Conn. Thomas will lead the club into MLS NEXT Pro and work towards achieving their MLS aspirations. This move marks a significant step for CT United FC, with high hopes for Thomas' leadership to propel the team to success.

data.title: RZLT shares plummet 90% after lead asset trial failure on Dec 11, 2025. Hagens Berman investigating losses.
data.description: Investors who suffered losses are advised to get in touch with the company in SAN FRANCISCO as per the news from December 23, 2025. On December 11, 2025, shareholders of Rezolute, Inc. (NASDAQ: RZLT) experienced a significant drop in share price, plummeting up to 90% during intraday trading. This decline followed the company's announcement of the failure of its...

data.title: Hagens Berman is investigating Ardent Health's $97M reserve issue causing a 33% stock drop. Leadership awareness under scrutiny.
data.description: Reed Kathrein, the lead partner, is emphasizing the importance of understanding the level of leadership awareness surrounding chronic issues relating to payor denials and collectability. This investigation, initiated by the well-known shareholder rights law firm Hagens Berman, is centered around possible securities violations. The focus is on determining the scale of leadership's knowledge regarding these issues. The news was announced on December 23, 2025, in San Francisco.

data.title: Preserve Sporting Club completes $88M Cozy Cabin Village with 60 luxury tiny homes, marking the largest fourth-season sporting club in New England.
data.description: In Richmond, Rhode Island, on December 23, 2025, The Preserve Sporting Club & Resort, which is recognized as New England's top four-season sporting club and a Preferred Hotel & Resort, has revealed the $88 million Cozy Cabin Village completion. This development has increased the total number of luxury tiny homes to 60, making it the largest village of its kind in the area.
